mapper.select: select orderid, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, runcnt, jobid, version, jobname,system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, DATE_FORMAT(eststarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as eststarttime, runningtime, DATE_FORMAT(realstarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realstarttime, DATE_FORMAT(realendtime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realendtime, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, DATE_FORMAT(orderdate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as orderdate, orderuserid from cotdl.tbl_piiorder order by orderid desc

select orderid, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, runcnt, jobid, version, jobname,system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, DATE_FORMAT(eststarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as eststarttime, runningtime, DATE_FORMAT(realstarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realstarttime, DATE_FORMAT(realendtime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realendtime, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, DATE_FORMAT(orderdate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as orderdate, orderuserid from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where (jobid, basedate) in( select a.jobid, min(a.basedate) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder a where 1=1 and eststarttime <= NOW() and status in ('Wait condition', 'Running') and holdflag = 'N' and forceokflag = 'N' and killflag = 'N' and confirmflag = 'N' and not exists(select 1 from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where jobid=a.jobid and status in ('Ended not OK', 'Running', 'Hold') and orderid!=a.orderid) and (select count(distinct jobid_w) from cotdl.tbl_piiorderjobwait b where a.orderid = b.orderid and type='PRE') = (select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder c where c.jobid in (select jobid_w from cotdl.tbl_piiorderjobwait b where a.orderid = b.orderid and type='PRE') and c.basedate = a.basedate and c.status = 'Ended OK' ) group by a.jobid )

select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where (jobid, basedate) in( select a.jobid, min(a.basedate) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder a where 1=1 and eststarttime <= NOW() and status in ('Wait condition', 'Running') and holdflag = 'N' and forceokflag = 'N' and killflag = 'N' and confirmflag = 'N' and not exists(select 1 from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where jobid=a.jobid and status in ('Ended not OK', 'Running', 'Hold') and orderid!=a.orderid) and (select count(distinct jobid_w) from cotdl.tbl_piiorderjobwait b where a.orderid = b.orderid and type='PRE') = (select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder c where c.jobid in (select jobid_w from cotdl.tbl_piiorderjobwait b where a.orderid = b.orderid and type='PRE') and c.basedate = a.basedate and c.status = 'Ended OK' ) group by a.jobid )
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder c where c.jobid like 'TESTDATA_PURGE:%' and c.status = 'Running'
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder c where c.jobid like 'TESTDATA_AUTO_GEN%' and c.status = 'Running'
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder c where c.jobid like 'RESTORE_CUSTID%' and c.status = 'Running'
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and status = 'Recovered' and basedate = STR_TO_DATE(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%Y/%m/%d')
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piiorder (orderid, basedate, runcnt, jobid, version, jobname,system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, eststarttime, runningtime, realstarttime, realendtime, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, orderdate, orderuserid) values (#{orderid}, str_to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), #{runcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{system, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{runtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{calendar, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{time, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confirmflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{holdflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{forceokflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{killflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, str_to_date(#{eststarttime, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s'), null, null, null, #{job_owner_id1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), #{orderuserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into cotdl.tbl_piiorder (orderid, basedate, runcnt, jobid, version, jobname,system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, eststarttime, runningtime, realstarttime, realendtime, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, orderdate, orderuserid) values (#{orderid}, str_to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), #{runcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{system, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{runtype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{calendar, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{time, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confirmflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{holdflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{forceokflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{killflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, str_to_date(#{eststarttime, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s'), null, null, null, #{job_owner_id1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_id3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job_owner_name3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), #{orderuserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select orderid, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, runcnt, jobid, version, jobname,system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, DATE_FORMAT(eststarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as eststarttime, runningtime, DATE_FORMAT(realstarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realstarttime, DATE_FORMAT(realendtime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realendtime, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, DATE_FORMAT(orderdate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as orderdate, orderuserid from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where orderid= (select max(orderid) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where jobid = #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and jobtype='PII' and status = 'Ended OK')

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status='Ended OK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ok, SUM(CASE WHEN status='Running' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS run, SUM(CASE WHEN status='Wait condition' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wait, SUM(CASE WHEN status='Ended not OK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ko, SUM(CASE WHEN status='Recovered' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recovered, COUNT(1) AS total FROM cotdl.tbl_piiorder WHERE status IN ('Running', 'Wait condition', 'Ended not OK', 'Hold') OR eststarttime >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piiorder set status= 'Running', realstarttime= COALESCE(realstarttime,NOW()), realendtime= null, runningtime= TIME_FORMAT(TIMEDIFF(now(),realstarttime),'%H : %i : %s'), runcnt = runcnt + 1 where orderid= #{orderid}

update cotdl.tbl_piiorder set status= (select rtrim(case when ok = 0 then 'Ended OK' when notok > 0 then 'Ended not OK' when running > 0 then 'Running' when wait > 0 then 'Running' end) from ( select COALESCE(sum(case when status != 'Ended OK' then 1 end),0) as ok , COALESCE(sum(case when status = 'Ended not OK' then 1 end),0) as notok , COALESCE(sum(case when status = 'Running' then 1 end),0) as running , COALESCE(sum(case when status = 'Wait condition' then 1 end),0) as wait from cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep where orderid= #{orderid} ) tmp ), runningtime= TIME_FORMAT(TIMEDIFF(now(),realstarttime),'%H : %i : %s'), realendtime= (select case when ok = 0 then NOW() when notok > 0 then NOW() when running > 0 then null when wait > 0 then null end from ( select COALESCE(sum(case when status != 'Ended OK' then 1 end),0) as ok , COALESCE(sum(case when status = 'Ended not OK' then 1 end),0) as notok , COALESCE(sum(case when status = 'Running' then 1 end),0) as running , COALESCE(sum(case when status = 'Wait condition' then 1 end),0) as wait from cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep where orderid= #{orderid} ) tmp ) where orderid= #{orderid}

update cotdl.tbl_piiorder set runcnt= #{runcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, confirmflag= #{confirmflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, holdflag= #{holdflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, forceokflag= #{forceokflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, killflag= #{killflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where orderid= #{orderid}

update cotdl.tbl_piiorder set confirmflag= #{confirmflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, holdflag= #{holdflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, forceokflag= #{forceokflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, eststarttime= str_to_date(#{eststarttime, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s')
where orderid= #{orderid}

update cotdl.tbl_piiorder set status= 'Wait condition', confirmflag= 'N', holdflag= 'N', forceokflag= 'N',
eststarttime=NOW(), runningtime= null, realstarttime= null, realendtime= null where orderid= #{orderid}
mapper.select: select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where jobid = upper(#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and version = #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and basedate = STR_TO_DATE(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%Y/%m/%d')

select jobid, max(version) as version, max(jobtype) as jobtype, max(runtype) as runtype, max(system) as system, max(calendar) as calendar, max(time) as time, max(job_owner_name1) as job_owner_name1 , max(policy_id) as policy_id, max(keymap_id) as keymap_id, count(jobid) as runcnt, min(basedate) as basedate_min, max(basedate) as basedate_max , max(realstarttime) as lastexedatetime from cotdl.tbl_piiorder group by jobid order by jobid

SELECT orderid, basedate, runcnt, jobid, version, jobname, system, policy_id, keymap_id, jobtype, runtype, calendar, time, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, eststarttime, runningtime, realstarttime, realendtime, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, orderdate, orderuserid FROM ( SELECT od.orderid, DATE_FORMAT(od.basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, od.runcnt, od.jobid, od.version, od.jobname, od.system, od.policy_id, od.keymap_id, od.jobtype, od.runtype, od.calendar, od.time, od.status, od.confirmflag, od.holdflag, od.forceokflag, od.killflag, DATE_FORMAT(od.eststarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as eststarttime, od.runningtime, DATE_FORMAT(od.realstarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realstarttime, DATE_FORMAT(od.realendtime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realendtime, od.job_owner_id1, od.job_owner_name1, od.job_owner_id2, od.job_owner_name2, od.job_owner_id3, od.job_owner_name3, DATE_FORMAT(od.orderdate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as orderdate, od.orderuserid, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY od.jobid ORDER BY od.orderid DESC) as rn FROM cotdl.tbl_piirestore rt JOIN cotdl.tbl_piiorder od ON rt.keymap_id = od.keymap_id AND rt.basedate = od.basedate WHERE od.runtype = 'REGULAR' AND od.status = 'ENDED OK' AND rt.custid = #{custid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) sub WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY realstarttime

SELECT jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, status, phase, threadcnt, commitcnt, enddate, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid FROM ( SELECT ot.jobid, ot.version, ot.stepid, ot.stepname, ot.steptype, ot.stepseq, ot.db, ot.status, ot.phase, ot.threadcnt, ot.commitcnt, DATE_FORMAT(ot.enddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as enddate, DATE_FORMAT(ot.regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(ot.upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, ot.reguserid, ot.upduserid, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY od.jobid ORDER BY od.orderid DESC ) as rn FROM cotdl.tbl_piirestore rt INNER JOIN cotdl.tbl_piiorder od ON rt.keymap_id = od.keymap_id AND rt.basedate = od.basedate INNER JOIN cotdl.tbl_piistep ot ON od.jobid = ot.jobid AND od.version = ot.version WHERE od.runtype = 'REGULAR' AND od.status = 'ENDED OK' AND ot.steptype = 'EXE_ARCHIVE' AND rt.custid = #{custid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) as subquery WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY stepseq
